_comment: Operad ambient hooks — zero-config session tracking for Claude Code.
Copy this into your project's .claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key,
or run: operad-session init (creates .claude/settings.json for you).
• Session start: prints graph ID and DB path
• Every tool call: recorded to ~/.operad/session.db in real-time
• Every 20 tool calls: progress hint in terminal
• Session end: summary (tools, reads, writes, redundant reads)
+ commands to inspect, visualize, and analyze cost
OPERAD_GRAPH_ID    — Override the graph ID (default: CLAUDE_SESSION_ID)

SessionStart.description: Initialize Operad graph and print tracking banner

PreToolUse.description: Record tool call to Operad graph (pre-execution)

PostToolUse.description: Record tool result and show progress hints

Notification.description: Record user goals (messages) to Operad graph

Stop.description: Print session summary: tools, reads, writes, waste, next steps

SessionEnd.description: Final cleanup and session end marker
